## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership opportunities between Marcel's AI-powered workflow company and Winning by Design to drive more pipeline and revenue.](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company builds custom AI workflows adapted to a company's strategy, combining AI with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [They have seen success automating various go-to-market processes like content creation, outreach, onboarding analysis](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Jacco is interested in minimizing human involvement in the sales process through AI/automation as much as possible](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [The next step is for Marcel to meet with Dave at Winning by Design to identify a specific use case to pilot and demonstrate value](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Company and Approach

  - [Combines strategy understanding with custom AI workflows and human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [Adapts AI to the company's processes rather than generic tools](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Has built workflows for content creation, personalized outreach, onboarding analysis, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [Helps teams focus on higher-value activities by automating routine tasks](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Jacco's Vision for AI in Sales

  - [Wants to minimize human involvement in the sales process as much as possible through AI/automation](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Believes 60-70% of sales tasks could potentially be automated with the right approach](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Struggles to identify which specific tasks still require human involvement](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Sees value in Marcel's approach but wants to take it further towards full automation](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up meeting between Marcel and Dave at Winning by Design](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Agree on initial use case/workflow to pilot](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Implement custom AI workflow for the chosen use case](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Measure and report results to evaluate partnership potential](https://fathom.video/share/YKxx6Vx4zTaQsKjKaxrKmZEoEzMWA5yu?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
